description: CT upload tests, image processing workflows

cases.input: I have uploaded a CT scan of the pelvis showing a prostate with seeds from a prior brachytherapy implant. Can you identify all visible seeds and assess the overall seed distribution pattern? Are there any obvious cold spots visible on this image?
cases.description: image_input test: CT seed identification distribution cold spots assessment

cases.input: This is a screenshot of a DVH display from our treatment planning system. Can you read the DVH curves and tell me the D90, V100, and V150 values for the prostate? Also identify the OAR curves and their dose values and any constraint violations present in the displayed plan?
cases.description: image_input test: DVH screenshot D90 V100 V150 prostate OAR reading constraint

cases.input: Describe the MRI protocol optimization for cervical cancer brachytherapy planning. What sequences are recommended for optimal soft tissue visualization, how should the imaging parameters be set for different MRI field strengths (1.5T vs 3T), and what are the specific requirements for imaging with the brachytherapy applicator in place?
cases.description: MRI protocol optimization for cervical brachytherapy

cases.input: Explain how diffusion-weighted MRI (DW-MRI) can be used to improve target volume definition in cervical cancer brachytherapy. How does the apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) correlate with tumor biology and treatment response? What are the limitations of DW-MRI in the post-treatment setting, and how can this information improve adaptive treatment planning?
cases.description: DW-MRI for cervical brachytherapy target definition

cases.input: Describe the CT imaging protocol for brachytherapy planning, including considerations for slice thickness, reconstruction kernels, contrast enhancement, and scan range. How do CT imaging parameters affect the accuracy of applicator reconstruction and dose calculation? What are the specific CT requirements for different applicator types?
cases.description: CT imaging protocol for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: Explain the process of CT-MRI image fusion for brachytherapy planning. What are the different registration methods (rigid, deformable), how do you evaluate registration accuracy, what are the common sources of registration error, and how does registration accuracy affect the clinical brachytherapy plan?
cases.description: CT-MRI image fusion for brachytherapy

cases.input: Describe the use of PET-CT imaging in brachytherapy planning for head and neck cancers. How can FDG-PET improve GTV delineation compared to CT and MRI alone? What are the specific PET artifacts caused by brachytherapy applicators, and how do you account for these artifacts in treatment planning?
cases.description: PET-CT for head and neck brachytherapy planning

cases.input: Explain the concept of functional MRI (fMRI) for brachytherapy planning. How can perfusion MRI and diffusion-weighted imaging improve the assessment of tumor hypoxia and treatment resistance? What is the current evidence for using functional MRI to guide dose painting in brachytherapy?
cases.description: Functional MRI for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: Describe the challenges of imaging for brachytherapy in the presence of metallic implants (hip prostheses, surgical clips, dental fillings). What artifact reduction techniques are available for CT, MRI, and PET imaging? How do these artifacts affect applicator reconstruction and dose calculation accuracy?
cases.description: Metallic implant imaging challenges for brachytherapy

cases.input: Explain the role of transrectal ultrasound (TRUS) in prostate brachytherapy planning. How does TRUS imaging compare to CT and MRI for prostate volume measurement and applicator guidance? What are the specific advantages of TRUS for real-time guidance during prostate brachytherapy applicator placement?
cases.description: TRUS for prostate brachytherapy planning and guidance

cases.input: Describe the use of cone-beam CT (CBCT) imaging for brachytherapy setup verification. How does CBCT compare to kV imaging for applicator position verification? What are the specific image quality limitations of CBCT in the pelvis, and how can these be mitigated to improve verification accuracy?
cases.description: CBCT for brachytherapy setup verification

cases.input: Explain the concept of on-line adaptive brachytherapy using real-time MRI imaging. How does the MRI-linac platform enable adaptive brachytherapy? What are the current technical limitations, the evidence for online adaptive approaches, and how do they differ from offline adaptive strategies?
cases.description: Online adaptive brachytherapy with MRI-linac

cases.input: Describe the quality assurance procedures for MRI-based brachytherapy imaging. What phantom tests are needed to verify MRI geometric accuracy, signal uniformity, and image distortion? How do you validate that the MRI imaging chain does not introduce clinically significant errors in applicator reconstruction and target delineation?
cases.description: MRI QA for brachytherapy imaging validation

cases.input: Explain how dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI (DCE-MRI) can improve assessment of treatment response during a course of brachytherapy. What pharmacokinetic parameters are measured, how do they correlate with tumor biology, and how can this information guide adaptive treatment planning decisions?
cases.description: DCE-MRI for brachytherapy treatment response assessment

cases.input: Describe the imaging considerations for brachytherapy of head and neck tumors. How does the complex anatomy of the head and neck affect imaging protocols? What are the specific MRI sequences needed for different tumor subsites (oral cavity, oropharynx, larynx), and how does the presence of dental hardware affect imaging quality?
cases.description: Head and neck brachytherapy imaging protocols

cases.input: Explain the use of CT perfusion imaging for assessing tumor perfusion changes during brachytherapy. How can perfusion parameters (blood flow, blood volume, mean transit time) be used to evaluate early treatment response? What are the technical challenges of performing CT perfusion in the pelvis during a course of brachytherapy?
cases.description: CT perfusion for brachytherapy response assessment

cases.input: Describe the image-guided adaptive brachytherapy (IGABT) workflow for cervical cancer. How is the adaptive plan created from MRI images, what decisions must be made at each fraction regarding plan adaptation versus replanning, and how do you document and verify the adaptive process? Include discussion of the GEC-ESTRO recommendations for IGABT.
cases.description: IGABT workflow for cervical cancer

cases.input: Explain how artificial intelligence and deep learning are being applied to brachytherapy imaging tasks. What are the current applications of AI in auto-contouring, applicator reconstruction, and image registration for brachytherapy? What are the validation requirements and limitations of AI-assisted imaging in the clinical brachytherapy setting?
cases.description: AI applications in brachytherapy imaging

cases.input: Describe the use of 4D-CT imaging for brachytherapy planning in tumors affected by respiratory motion. How does 4D-CT improve target volume definition compared to conventional CT? What are the specific challenges of 4D-CT in the pelvis, and how do you manage respiratory motion in upper abdominal brachytherapy?
cases.description: 4D-CT for brachytherapy motion management

cases.input: Explain the concept of MRI thermometry for brachytherapy applications. How can real-time temperature mapping during brachytherapy improve treatment delivery? What are the technical requirements for MRI thermometry, and what is the current evidence for its clinical utility in brachytherapy?
cases.description: MRI thermometry for brachytherapy

cases.input: Describe the imaging requirements for quality assurance of MRI-guided brachytherapy programs. What test objects and phantoms are needed, how do you verify imaging accuracy across the MRI room and treatment room, and what are the specific QA recommendations from professional organizations?
cases.description: Imaging QA for MRI-guided brachytherapy

cases.input: Explain how radiomics and texture analysis of pre-treatment MRI can predict brachytherapy outcomes in cervical cancer. What specific radiomic features correlate with local control and toxicity? How should radiomic studies be designed to ensure reproducibility and clinical applicability?
cases.description: Radiomics for predicting brachytherapy outcomes

cases.input: Describe the use of multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) for brachytherapy planning in prostate cancer. How do T2-weighted, DW-MRI, and DCE-MRI sequences complement each other for target delineation? What is the evidence for MRI-based prostate brachytherapy planning compared to TRUS and CT?
cases.description: Multiparametric MRI for prostate brachytherapy

cases.input: Explain how cone-beam CT (CBCT) with dual-energy capabilities can improve brachytherapy planning and verification. What are the advantages of dual-energy CBCT for tissue characterization, metal artifact reduction, and applicator visualization in brachytherapy?
cases.description: Dual-energy CBCT for brachytherapy

cases.input: A center is developing a protocol for using synthetic CT generation from MRI for dose calculation in MRI-guided brachytherapy. Describe the sCT generation methodology, the validation requirements for dose calculation accuracy compared to conventional CT, the specific challenges of sCT generation near metallic applicators, and the regulatory pathway for clinical implementation of MRI-only treatment planning.
cases.description: Synthetic CT for MRI-only brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand how MRI-guided adaptive brachytherapy (IGABT) works for cervical cancer. Specifically: (1) What imaging sequences are recommended for brachytherapy planning MRI, (2) How does MRI improve target volume delineation compared to CT, (3) What is the concept of adaptive treatment planning in brachytherapy, and (4) How does the GEC-ESTRO recommends reporting MRI-based brachytherapy plans?
cases.description: Comprehensive question about MRI-guided adaptive brachytherapy

cases.input: I am performing CT-MRI fusion for prostate brachytherapy planning. The patient has a pelvic MRI with T2-weighted sequences. I need to understand: (1) What are the recommended MRI sequences for prostate delineation, (2) How do I perform CT-MRI registration and what are the sources of registration error, (3) How does MRI improve prostate and OAR delineation compared to CT, and (4) What quality assurance steps should I perform for the fused images?
cases.description: Practical question about CT-MRI fusion for prostate brachytherapy

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of deformable image registration (DIR) for adaptive brachytherapy. In cervical cancer IGABT, the applicator position and tumor shape change between fractions. How does DIR help accumulate dose across fractions? What are the available DIR algorithms (B-spline, demons, etc.)? What are the limitations and accuracy of DIR in the pelvis? How should I validate DIR results for brachytherapy applications?
cases.description: Advanced question about deformable image registration for adaptive brachytherapy

cases.input: I am evaluating PET-CT for brachytherapy planning in cervical cancer. FDG-PET can visualize the primary tumor and lymph nodes. How should I integrate PET findings into brachytherapy target volume delineation? What are the limitations of PET for brachytherapy planning? How does PET-CT compare with MRI for target delineation? Should I use PET-CT routinely for brachytherapy planning?
cases.description: Question about PET-CT integration in brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand how to perform MRI-based brachytherapy planning for cervical cancer using the T2-weighted sequences. The GEC-ESTRO recommends delineating: HR-CTV, IR-CTV, and the OARs. How do I delineate the HR-CTV on axial T2-weighted images? What are the specific boundaries? How do I account for the applicator in MRI-based planning? What is the recommended MRI protocol for brachytherapy?
cases.description: Practical question about MRI-based target delineation for cervical brachytherapy

cases.input: I am performing a quality assurance check on the CT simulation for brachytherapy planning. I need to verify: (1) CT number accuracy using a phantom, (2) geometric accuracy of the CT images, (3) the effect of contrast material on CT-based dose calculation, and (4) the appropriate CT-to-electron-density conversion table for brachytherapy applicators. How do I perform each of these QA checks?
cases.description: QA question for CT simulation in brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of 4D brachytherapy planning. In cervical cancer IGABT, the tumor and applicator positions change between fractions. How does 4D brachytherapy account for these changes? What imaging should be performed at each fraction? How should I accumulate dose across fractions using deformable registration? What are the clinical benefits of 4D planning compared to single-fraction planning?
cases.description: Question about 4D adaptive brachytherapy planning concept

cases.input: I am evaluating the use of ultrasound for real-time guidance during prostate brachytherapy seed implantation. How does transrectal ultrasound (TRUS) guidance work for prostate seed implantation? What are the advantages of real-time TRUS-guided implantation compared to pre-planned approaches? How do I perform prostate volume reconstruction from TRUS images? What are the limitations of TRUS for prostate delineation?
cases.description: Question about ultrasound guidance for prostate brachytherapy

cases.input: I need to understand the role of diffusion-weighted MRI (DW-MRI) in brachytherapy planning for cervical cancer. How does DW-MRI help in tumor delineation? What is the apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) and how does it relate to tumor biology? Can DW-MRI help predict treatment response during brachytherapy? What are the limitations of DW-MRI for brachytherapy target delineation?
cases.description: Question about diffusion-weighted MRI in brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I am performing a brachytherapy planning quality assurance review. I need to verify the accuracy of the CT-based applicator reconstruction. How do I verify that the applicator reconstruction on CT is geometrically accurate? What are the potential sources of reconstruction error? How does applicator reconstruction accuracy affect dose calculation? What QA tools exist for applicator reconstruction verification?
cases.description: QA question about applicator reconstruction accuracy

cases.input: I need to understand how cone-beam CT (CBCT) can be used for brachytherapy guidance. What are the advantages of CBCT over conventional CT for brachytherapy? How does CBCT image quality compare to CT for applicator and target visualization? What are the radiation dose implications of using CBCT for brachytherapy guidance? Should I use CBCT routinely for brachytherapy fraction imaging?
cases.description: Question about cone-beam CT for brachytherapy guidance

cases.input: I am evaluating the use of MRI for post-implant dosimetry evaluation of prostate LDR brachytherapy. How does MRI improve seed visualization compared to CT? What MRI sequences are best for seed localization? How does MRI-based post-implant dosimetry compare with CT-based evaluation? What are the practical challenges of MRI-based post-implant dosimetry?
cases.description: Question about MRI for post-implant dosimetry evaluation

cases.input: I need to understand how to handle MRI artifacts in brachytherapy planning. What types of MRI artifacts can affect brachytherapy planning (susceptibility artifacts from metallic applicators, chemical shift artifacts, motion artifacts)? How do these artifacts affect target and applicator delineation? What correction methods exist? How should I adjust the MRI protocol to minimize artifacts?
cases.description: Technical question about MRI artifacts in brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I am implementing an image-guided adaptive brachytherapy (IGABT) program for cervical cancer. What imaging equipment and software are needed? What is the recommended imaging protocol (CT, MRI, or both)? How do I integrate imaging into the brachytherapy workflow? What are the staffing and training requirements for an IGABT program? What are the cost considerations?
cases.description: Implementation question for IGABT program

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of functional imaging for brachytherapy planning. How can DCE-MRI help in target delineation for cervical cancer brachytherapy? What pharmacokinetic parameters (Ktrans, Ve, Vp) are relevant? Can functional imaging help predict brachytherapy response? What are the limitations of functional imaging for brachytherapy planning?
cases.description: Advanced question about functional imaging for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I am performing brachytherapy planning for a breast cancer patient using multi-catheter interstitial applicator. I need to understand: (1) What imaging modality is best for catheter reconstruction, (2) How do I verify catheter positions using CT, (3) What is the role of 3D printing for customized applicators, and (4) How do I perform CT-based dose optimization for the multi-catheter plan?
cases.description: Question about imaging and planning for multi-catheter breast brachytherapy

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of MRI thermometry for brachytherapy guidance. Can MRI thermometry be used to monitor tissue temperature during HDR brachytherapy? How does MRI thermometry work? What are the applications of MRI thermometry in brachytherapy? What are the limitations of current MRI thermometry technology?
cases.description: Advanced question about MRI thermometry for brachytherapy guidance

cases.input: I am evaluating the use of artificial intelligence (AI) for brachytherapy planning. How can AI assist in: (1) automatic applicator reconstruction from CT/MRI, (2) automatic target volume delineation, (3) dose optimization, and (4) plan quality evaluation? What are the current limitations of AI in brachytherapy? What validation studies exist for AI-based brachytherapy planning?
cases.description: Question about AI applications in brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand the role of PET-MRI for brachytherapy planning. What are the advantages of combined PET-MRI over sequential PET-CT and MRI? How does simultaneous PET-MRI acquisition improve target delineation? What are the technical challenges of PET-MRI for brachytherapy? Is PET-MRI clinically superior to PET-CT plus MRI for brachytherapy planning?
cases.description: Question about PET-MRI for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I am performing a brachytherapy planning review for a cervical cancer patient. The planning CT shows significant motion artifact in the pelvic region due to bowel peristalsis. How does motion artifact affect brachytherapy dose calculation? What are the strategies to minimize motion artifact during CT simulation? Should I repeat the CT scan? How does motion artifact affect applicator reconstruction accuracy?
cases.description: Practical question about motion artifacts in brachytherapy CT simulation

cases.input: I need to understand how dual-energy CT (DECT) can be used for brachytherapy planning. What are the advantages of DECT over single-energy CT for applicator and tissue delineation? How does DECT improve material decomposition? Can DECT reduce metallic artifacts from brachytherapy applicators? What are the clinical applications of DECT in brachytherapy?
cases.description: Question about dual-energy CT for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I am implementing MRI-guided brachytherapy for prostate cancer. I need to understand: (1) What MRI sequences are recommended for prostate delineation during brachytherapy, (2) How do I perform MRI-based applicator reconstruction, (3) What are the differences between MRI-based and CT-based dose calculations for prostate brachytherapy, and (4) What QA procedures should I perform for MRI-guided prostate brachytherapy?
cases.description: Implementation question for MRI-guided prostate brachytherapy

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of radiomics and texture analysis for brachytherapy planning. How can radiomics features extracted from MRI help predict brachytherapy response? What texture features are most relevant for cervical cancer brachytherapy? How can machine learning models be trained to predict treatment outcomes? What are the limitations of radiomics for brachytherapy?
cases.description: Advanced question about radiomics for brachytherapy outcome prediction

cases.input: I am performing quality assurance on the MRI scanner used for brachytherapy planning. What specific QA tests should I perform? How do I verify MRI geometric accuracy? How do I ensure consistent image quality over time? What are the recommended QA frequencies for MRI in radiation oncology?
cases.description: Comprehensive question about MRI QA for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand how to handle imaging data from multiple modalities in brachytherapy planning. For a cervical cancer patient, I have: (1) diagnostic MRI from initial staging, (2) treatment planning CT with applicator in place, (3) fraction-specific MRI with applicator, and (4) PET-CT from restaging. How do I integrate all these imaging datasets? What registration methods should I use? How do I account for different image resolutions and contrasts?
cases.description: Complex question about multi-modality data integration for brachytherapy

cases.input: I am evaluating the use of MRI for brachytherapy planning in rectal cancer. How does MRI help in delineating the rectal tumor and mesorectal fascia? What MRI sequences are recommended for rectal cancer brachytherapy? How does MRI-based planning compare with CT-based planning for rectal brachytherapy? What are the challenges of MRI-guided rectal brachytherapy?
cases.description: Question about MRI for rectal cancer brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of virtual reality (VR) and 3D visualization for brachytherapy planning. How can 3D visualization improve brachytherapy treatment planning? What VR tools exist for radiation therapy planning? How does 3D visualization help with applicator placement assessment and dose evaluation? What are the limitations of current VR technology for brachytherapy?
cases.description: Question about VR and 3D visualization for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I am performing image fusion for brachytherapy planning of a vaginal cancer. I have a planning CT with vaginal cylinder in place and a diagnostic MRI. How do I perform CT-MRI fusion for this case? What are the specific challenges of fusing CT and MRI for vaginal brachytherapy? How does the applicator affect the fusion accuracy? What QA steps should I perform to verify the fusion?
cases.description: Practical question about CT-MRI fusion for vaginal brachytherapy

cases.input: I need to understand how perfusion MRI can help in brachytherapy planning. How does dynamic contrast-enhanced (DCE) MRI assess tumor vascularity? Can perfusion parameters predict brachytherapy response? How should I incorporate perfusion data into brachytherapy target delineation? What are the technical requirements for performing perfusion MRI for brachytherapy planning?
cases.description: Advanced question about perfusion MRI for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I am evaluating the accuracy of 3D ultrasound for brachytherapy guidance in gynecologic cancer. How does 3D ultrasound compare with MRI for target delineation? What are the advantages of 3D ultrasound over 2D ultrasound? Can 3D ultrasound replace MRI for brachytherapy planning in resource-limited settings? What are the training requirements for 3D ultrasound-guided brachytherapy?
cases.description: Question about 3D ultrasound for brachytherapy guidance

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of dose accumulation using deformable registration in adaptive brachytherapy. For a cervical cancer patient treated with 5 fractions of HDR brachytherapy, how do I accumulate dose from each fraction? What deformable registration algorithms are most appropriate? How do I handle the applicator displacement between fractions? What are the uncertainties in dose accumulation?
cases.description: Advanced question about dose accumulation in adaptive brachytherapy

cases.input: I am performing brachytherapy planning for a prostate cancer patient with a hip replacement. The metallic hip implant causes significant CT artifacts. How do these artifacts affect: (1) prostate contouring, (2) seed localization, (3) dose calculation, and (4) organ-at-risk delineation? What strategies can I use to mitigate these artifacts? Should I use MRI instead of CT for planning?
cases.description: Comprehensive question about hip implant artifacts in brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand the role of artificial intelligence in automatic organ-at-risk delineation for brachytherapy. How accurate are current AI algorithms for OAR segmentation in the pelvis? What are the clinical requirements for AI-based OAR delineation? How should I validate AI-generated contours before using them in brachytherapy planning? What are the current limitations?
cases.description: Question about AI for automatic OAR delineation in brachytherapy

cases.input: I am evaluating the use of spectral CT for brachytherapy planning. How does spectral CT improve material characterization compared to conventional CT? Can spectral CT reduce artifacts from brachytherapy applicators? What are the advantages for dose calculation? What are the current limitations?
cases.description: Question about spectral CT for brachytherapy planning

cases.input: I need to understand how to perform quality assurance for deformable image registration in adaptive brachytherapy. What phantom-based QA tests should I perform? How do I quantify registration accuracy? What are the acceptable accuracy criteria for pelvic DIR in brachytherapy? How often should I perform DIR QA?
cases.description: QA question for deformable image registration in adaptive brachytherapy

cases.input: I am performing brachytherapy planning for a pediatric patient with a pelvic rhabdomyosarcoma. What imaging considerations are specific to pediatric brachytherapy? How do I minimize radiation exposure from imaging in a child? What MRI protocols are appropriate for pediatric pelvic brachytherapy? How do I account for smaller anatomy and developing organs in image-based planning?
cases.description: Imaging question for pediatric brachytherapy with developing anatomy

cases.input: I need to understand the concept of online adaptive brachytherapy using MR-Linac technology. How can an MR-Linac be used for brachytherapy? What are the advantages of real-time MRI guidance during brachytherapy? How does online adaptive planning work? What are the current limitations and clinical evidence for MR-Linac brachytherapy?
cases.description: Question about MR-Linac technology for brachytherapy

cases.input: I am evaluating the use of emerging imaging technologies for brachytherapy guidance. Are there any novel imaging modalities that could improve brachytherapy planning? What are the current research directions in brachytherapy imaging? How might photoacoustic imaging or optical coherence tomography be applied to brachytherapy? What is the timeline for clinical implementation?
cases.description: Forward-looking question about emerging imaging technologies for brachytherapy

cases.input: I need to understand how to perform image quality assessment for brachytherapy planning CT. What metrics should I use to evaluate CT image quality? How do I measure spatial resolution, contrast resolution, and noise? How do these quality parameters affect brachytherapy dose calculation? What are the minimum image quality requirements for brachytherapy planning?
cases.description: Comprehensive question about CT image quality assessment for brachytherapy

cases.input: I am reviewing a brachytherapy plan where the planning CT shows significant bowel gas in the pelvis. How does bowel gas affect brachytherapy dose calculation? What strategies can I use to minimize bowel gas during CT simulation? How should I handle bowel gas in the treatment planning system? Should I consider repeating the CT scan?
cases.description: Practical question about bowel gas effects on brachytherapy CT simulation
